title: calea nitida
intro: Calea nitida, also known as Mexican Damiana, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and other female health issues. Calea nitida is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a capsule or added to other herbal remedies.
